ddl:createStatement.ddl:statement: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW "IFICURRENCY" AS SELECT "TCURC"."MANDT" AS "MANDT", "TCURC"."WAERS" AS "CURRENCY", ( COALESCE( "TCURX"."CURRDEC", 2 ) ) AS "DECIMALS", "TCURC"."ISOCD" AS "CURRENCYISOCODE", "TCURC"."ALTWR" AS "ALTERNATIVECURRENCYKEY", "TCURC"."XPRIMARY" AS "ISPRIMARYCURRENCYFORISOCRCY" FROM "TCURC" "TCURC" LEFT OUTER JOIN "TCURX" "TCURX" ON "TCURC"."WAERS" = "TCURX"."CURRKEY"
